examples: A trader said gold sold briskly on the local market.
'The market is absolutely dead this morning,' said one foreign exchange trader.
"The Hewlett-Packard news brings a better tone to the market, which has been in a kind of holding pattern," said one trader.
In the second, Johnson allegedly paid kickbacks to a trader at JPMorgan Chase for stock loan trades.
Few things anger a trader more than seeing inaccessible market prints while actively trading in a particular security.
